text:
Henry Bloedorn brought three ineffective assistance claims regarding attorney represented during plea sentencing.
That attorney's unchallenged testimony Machner hearing convinced circuit court, court appeals, that performance gave cause complaint.
Bloedorn claims that attorney ineffective "(1) failing adequately advise regarding evidence against him, defense strategy, possible prison sentences; allowing presentence investigation (PSI) continue while still considering whether withdraw guilty plea; failing properly argue reasonable prison sentence."
(¶1).
court appeals recounts attorney's Machner testimony length (¶¶3-8) before serially rejecting three claims.
Regarding first claim, court notes attorney's testimony (which contradicted) that spent many hours with Bloedorn giving very advice Bloedorn claims have lacked.
(¶¶20-22).
second, court observes that counsel power delay preparation PSI, that only plea withdrawal, which Bloedorn seek, would likely have accomplished this.
(¶¶23-24).
third, defense counsel recommended more prison time than asked for, asked that stayed favor probation; court appeals agrees with circuit court that this choice, which counsel discussed with Bloedorn, reasonable strategic one.
(¶¶25-26).

Berkeley about miles from Louis suburb Ferguson, where 18-year-old Michael Brown shot dead white officer.
Louis County police chief Belmar said police officer responding call about theft when Antonio Martin another petrol station North Hanley Road approached them.
said that Antonio Martin pointed handgun officer, officer responded firing three shots.
shots Antonio Martin, said.
officer "responded with what thought commensurate force time", Col. Belmar said, adding that "most would feel imminent danger losing lives that point".
Col. Belmar described incident tragedy everybody", said prosecutor been assigned investigate case.
"Our hearts certainly family, choices were made," added.
Berkeley Mayor Theodore Hoskins said that both city Louis County would hold independent investigations.
Between people gathered scene after incident, Col. Belmar said, adding that bricks were thrown police officers, three explosive devices off.
Four people been arrested assaulting police officers, said.
Police releasing video footage run-up shooting, image second man, fled scene.
handgun said belong Antonio Martin been recovered police.

herd mentality alive well.
Seems like everyone stampeding sell their stocks today.
Even cuts interest rates three-quarters point, more than already been priced into market.
Presidential candidates talking about some sort economic stimulus plan.
stock market supposed forward looking, drop like today's seems signaling RECESSION.
that really cards?
Sure, there's some pain inflation front, mainly steep rise prices last year, there's some more pain home mortgage front, which reasonably expected lower consumer economic activity, least some degree.
what people seem forgetting that most this pain already been priced into market, most companies outside mortgage lending business reporting very reasonable earnings.
Today's steep sell-off, with down over NASDAQ over 100, justified numbers, merely reflection lemming-style mentality that sometimes seems infect trader's minds.
what should
Don't another lemming.
Buy!
Now's time!
that adage 'buy low, sell high' your advantage.
This opportunity won't last long just while I've been writing this post, risen points NASDAQ
Sure, it's little scary going against tide, prizes never chickens.

Elizabeth Media Fund's Commonwealth Digital Challenge 2019 open.
Application form available here.
hope competition will inspire, help, young innovators entrepreneurs find ways improving media through technology.
originally established Elizabeth Broadcasting Fund 1995 assist development broadcasting skills Commonwealth with donation from Buckingham Palace.
donation came from royalties from "Elizabeth 1992 documentary which marked 40th anniversary reign Queen Elizabeth
Fund fulfilled important role more than years, bringing together Commonwealth broadcasters programme travel bursaries training opportunities.
However, media landscape changed greatly since that ground-breaking Elizabeth documentary Fund developing meet challenges media's digital age.
Thomson Foundation been charged with re-branding re-launching Fund.
fitting choice foundation has, over years, helped raise standards journalism communications across world trained journalists media managers from every Commonwealth country.

that both Jong Donald Trump arrived Singapore talks that could change course nation, North Korean state state-run news service were silent about events taking place South East Asia.
State media rarely reports activities Jong advance silence isn't surprise, does serve highlight closed society that North Koreans live
Because foreign media isn't permitted into country, state media services able cover events their pace.
Part lack advance coverage what Jong doing advance often seen security measure, keeping whereabouts confined small number people, it's also partly state shape narrative event once they've seen it's outcome.
telegraphing expectations, result portrayed victorious plan along.
This avoids precisely situation President Trump worked himself into, first talking about complete denuclearization mentioning Nobel Prize, trying walk back while deflecting some already calling reduced aims failure.
what North Korean report Sunday?
main evening news with statement made Nepali scholar North Korean politics that lauded Jong defender peace Korean peninsula world.
Reports anything complementary said about Jong people overseas often carried news items.
What's little interesting about this that state news wire carried item June
news continued with reports workers laying wreaths monuments Sung Jong factory workers looking exhibit Jong visited their workplace news construction projects, agriculture other social activities.
thoroughly typical every daily news bulletin North Korean state
Jong make appearance.
Sunday, state replayed report visiting Pyongyang Seafood Restaurant.
broadcast four times Sunday after having aired four times Saturday.

patient support charity Fertility Network announced support groups which have been recently Lancashire/Cumbria Hull.
know many people don't like think that they might need "support group" what invaluable about groups being able meet with other people going through similar things share experiences.
really such huge relief just know that there other people there finding hard happy when close friend announces pregnancy, take long detours avoid local nursery pick drop times.
Going along group sign strength rather than suggesting that need more support than other people that way, useful free helping yourself through treatment.
more information about Lancashire/Cumbria group, please email Hull group, email

flight crew pulled their trick abruptly turning cabin lights wake everyone breakfast.
Breakfast soft warm croissant with butter jam, banana, juice, mints.
They also were kind provide wipe freshening your hands face after miserable night.
arrived about minutes late Dublin, Ireland.
Customs very easy
first passport stamps (Canada, Mexico Cayman Islands hadn't required passports past).
Mark live about hours away from Dublin Northern Ireland.
just pause right here give short history/geography those know.
Northern Ireland actually part Ireland.
part (the United Kingdom: which includes England, Scotland, Wales Northern Ireland.)
This separation occurred 1921.
Before then, South Ireland would have actually been under English rule well.
So... back arrival Sunday morning.
Because Mark's Sunday morning schedule, Mark's wonderful brother Peter (who lives Portadown, much closer Dublin) picked airport drove Colerain.
David crashed little nap, then headed evening service.
ladies wear hats church here head coverings.
borrowed De's adorable hats.
look atrocious hats.

kind we're used sang song, wonderful meet their warm real congregation people.
they have under-the-pew heaters!
